May emit a {RoleGranted} event."},"handleLiquidationUSDC(uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"usdcAmount":"The amount of USDC recovered from the sale (6 decimals)","vaultId":"The ID of the vault being liquidated"}},"hasRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Returns `true` if `account` has been granted `role`."},"markVaultFailed(uint256)":{"details":"Restricted to ORACLE_ROLE or contracts with authorized relay access"},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"receiveValuation((uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256))":{"details":"Restricted to ORACLE_ROLE \u2014 only DON-authorized report submitters"},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. ccipReceive((bytes32,uint64,bytes,bytes,.details: Note ensure you check the msg.sender is the OffRampRouter.

depositCollateral(address,uint256,uint25.details: Emits CollateralDeposited event consumed by CRE Workflow DON

depositCollateralWithAIValue(address,uin.details: This skips CCIP and DON completely. Do NOT deploy or use in production.

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

params.usdcAmount: The amount of USDC recovered from the sale (6 decimals)
params.vaultId: The ID of the vault being liquidated

markVaultFailed(uint256).details: Restricted to ORACLE_ROLE or contracts with authorized relay access

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

receiveValuation((uint256,uint256,uint25.details: Restricted to ORACLE_ROLE — only DON-authorized report submitters

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

triggerResolutionCutoff(uint256).details: Callable by ORACLE_ROLE (Chainlink DON). Transitions vault to LIQUIDATING regardless of health.

ccipReceive((bytes32,uint64,bytes,bytes,.notice: Called by the Router to deliver a message. If this reverts, any token transfers also revert. The message will move to a FAILED state and become available for manual execution.

claimSurplus(uint256).notice: Claim surplus USDC from a liquidated vault

clearDebt(uint256,uint256).notice: Clear debt for a vault after repayment (called by cross-chain receiver)

depositCollateral(address,uint256,uint25.notice: Deposit ERC-1155 prediction tokens as collateral and request a cross-chain loan

depositCollateralWithAIValue(address,uin.notice: Local Demo bypass for depositing collateral while explicitly passing the AI valuation.

handleLiquidationUSDC(uint256,uint256).notice: Handle incoming USDC from PolymarketAdapter liquidation

hubReceiver().notice: Hub Receiver address on the destination chain

localChainSelector().notice: The CCIP chain selector for the current local chain (for bypass)

maintenanceMargin().notice: Maintenance margin — health factor below this triggers liquidation

markVaultFailed(uint256).notice: Mark a vault as FAILED (for cross-chain transaction failures)

minTimeToResolution().notice: Minimum time-to-resolution required when opening a new vault

polymarketAdapter().notice: Address of the PolymarketAdapter authorized to dump collateral

receiveValuation((uint256,uint256,uint25.notice: Receive and apply an AI valuation report from the CRE DON

recoverCollateral(uint256).notice: Emergency recovery for failed cross-chain transactions

resolutionCutoff().notice: Force-liquidate vaults within this many seconds of market resolution

setHubParams(address,address,address).notice: Set the Hub Receiver address and LINK token

triggerResolutionCutoff(uint256).notice: Force-liquidate a vault whose market is within the resolution cutoff window

withdrawCollateral(uint256).notice: Withdraw collateral after loan is fully repaid

withdrawFees(address,uint256).notice: Recover unused fee tokens (LINK or Native)
